# [EN-02] RBB (Reverse Body Bias) — land γ-side RTL

> Plan ID `EN-02` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

🟡 **Witness-only.** `crates/rbb-witness/` pins the parameter band
(`V_BS ≈ −2.5 mV` = `−V_DD · γ⁴` with `γ = φ⁻³`; leak-save band
[35 %, 50 %]; clock-tree invariance `|Δf| ≤ 50 bps`). **No
`src/rbb_*.v` exists in this repo today.**

## Plan

1. Land `src/rbb_idle_well.v` with header matching the
   `src/fbb_active_path.v` / `src/drowsy_ret.v` convention
   (SPDX, Wave-47 attribution, sacred-opcode `0xF1`).
2. Hold the parameter band from `crates/rbb-witness/src/lib.rs`:
   `V_BS_MAG_DECIMV ∈ [22, 28]`, `LEAK_SAVE_BPS ∈ [3500, 5000]`.
3. Add `test/tb_rbb_idle_well.v` covering: `V_BS` step, leak-save
   band assertion, clock-tree invariance (`|Δf| ≤ 50 bps`).
4. Add to top-level `info.yaml` source list if and only if the
   GDS submission for this wave will include it (changes the GDS
   hash — see R5 note).

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `src/rbb_idle_well.v` lands and elaborates clean.
- [ ] `test/tb_rbb_idle_well.v` PASSES under `iverilog`.
- [ ] R-SI-1 still PASS.
- [ ] Anchor regression: `sim/tb_canonical.v` still 3 PASS, 0 FAIL.
- [ ] [`TRIPLE_DECK_STATUS.md`](../../TRIPLE_DECK_STATUS.md) §2.2
      updated to flip RBB from ❌ to ✅ in the RTL gate.

## R5 honesty

- Landing this module **changes the GDS hash** and therefore the
  TTSKY26b submission. Coordinate with the shuttle release before
  merging.
- No measured silicon leakage-save number will be claimed by closing
  this issue — only that the RTL exists and the simulation band holds.
- The `V_BS ≈ −2.5 mV` and `40 %` leak-save figures come from
  `crates/rbb-witness/` modelling, not from measurement.
